tools.name: kubeconform
tools.run_command: kubeconform -summary -output text -ignore-missing-schemas -schema-location default -schema-location 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/datreeio/CRDs-catalog/main/{{.Group}}/{{.ResourceKind}}_{{.ResourceAPIVersion}}.json' pipelineruns/ pipeline/ gitops/ integration-tests/
tools.scope: Kubernetes manifests in pipelineruns/, pipeline/, gitops/, integration-tests/

linting.notes: yamllint validates YAML syntax and style. kubeconform validates Kubernetes resource schemas. Current codebase has yamllint errors (trailing spaces in odh-konflux-onboarder.yml).

testing.notes: This repository contains Tekton pipeline definitions for integration tests, not executable test code. Integration tests are PipelineRuns that provision ephemeral Hypershift/Kubernetes clusters and require Konflux infrastructure. They cannot be run locally.

gating_checks.name: YAML Lint / kubeconform
gating_checks.command: kubeconform -summary -output text -ignore-missing-schemas -schema-location default -schema-location 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/datreeio/CRDs-catalog/main/{{.Group}}/{{.ResourceKind}}_{{.ResourceAPIVersion}}.json' pipelineruns/ pipeline/ gitops/ integration-tests/

ci.notes: yaml-lint.yaml runs on all PRs and pushes to main. build-integration-images.yml runs on pushes that modify integration-tests/** files. odh-konflux-onboarder.yml is a manual workflow_dispatch for component onboarding.

build.notes: This is a configuration repository containing YAML manifests. No build process required. Docker images are built from integration-tests/*/Dockerfile.* files when changed.

conventions.test_naming: Tekton PipelineRun manifests with descriptive names (e.g., e2e-test.yaml, pr-test-pipelinerun.yaml)
conventions.notes: Repository follows .yamllint rules. Tekton pipelines stored in pipeline/, PipelineRuns in pipelineruns/ and integration-tests/. GitOps manifests in gitops/. Integration test Dockerfiles use Dockerfile.<tag> naming pattern.

lint_commands.notes: Exit code 1 - found lint errors (trailing spaces in odh-konflux-onboarder.yml). Command works correctly.

lint_commands.command: kubeconform -summary -output text -ignore-missing-schemas -schema-location default -schema-location 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/datreeio/CRDs-catalog/main/{{.Group}}/{{.ResourceKind}}_{{.ResourceAPIVersion}}.json' pipelineruns/ pipeline/ gitops/ integration-tests/
lint_commands.notes: Exit code 0 - schema validation passed. 398 resources skipped (custom CRDs not in public schema catalog).

container_recipe.notes: No unit tests exist. Integration tests are Tekton pipelines requiring Kubernetes cluster infrastructure.

results.output_snippet:

  71:1      error    trailing spaces  (trailing-spaces)
  79:1      error    trailing spaces  (trailing-spaces)
  84:1      error    trailing spaces  (trailing-spaces)
results.notes: yamllint works correctly. Exit code 1 indicates lint violations found (trailing spaces), not a broken command. Found errors in odh-konflux-onboarder.yml.

results.command: kubeconform -summary -output text -ignore-missing-schemas -schema-location default -schema-location 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/datreeio/CRDs-catalog/main/{{.Group}}/{{.ResourceKind}}_{{.ResourceAPIVersion}}.json' pipelineruns/ pipeline/ gitops/ integration-tests/
results.output_snippet: Summary: 398 resources found in 212 files - Valid: 0, Invalid: 0, Errors: 0, Skipped: 398
results.notes: kubeconform validated successfully. All 398 resources were skipped (custom Tekton/Konflux CRDs not in public schema catalogs), but no structural errors found.

validation.summary: Both lint tools validated successfully. yamllint found style violations (trailing spaces). kubeconform validated schema structure (398 resources skipped as custom CRDs). No tests exist.

gaps: No unit tests - repository contains only YAML configuration files
Integration tests are Tekton PipelineRuns requiring Kubernetes/Hypershift cluster infrastructure - cannot be run locally
yamllint errors exist in current codebase (trailing spaces in odh-konflux-onboarder.yml)
kubeconform skips all resources due to custom CRDs (Tekton, Konflux) not being in public schema catalogs
No automated testing of pipeline logic - only YAML syntax/schema validation
No way to validate Tekton pipeline correctness without running them on a cluster
